section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has a history of type 2 diabetes and hypertension.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Past medical history is typically documented in the subjective/history portion rather than the assessment, unless being explicitly synthesized as part of a diagnostic impression.
This is framed as an ongoing management action rather than a diagnostic impression; it describes treatment/management rather than assessment.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports anxiety and pressure.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a patient-reported symptom and belongs in the subjective section, not in the clinician assessment.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient plans to take a vacation.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a patient-stated intention rather than a clinician management plan; it fits better as subjective context than as a formal plan item.
